prompt: I need to create a PR for my work. I'm on branch DA-8823/fix-booking-metrics and I've already cleaned up my commits - I have 3 commits total: 'feat(analytics): update booking metrics calculation', 'test(analytics): add tests for new metrics', and 'docs(analytics): update README with metric definitions'. This fixes an issue where we were double-counting some bookings in our dashboards.

assertions.name: PR title matches regex format
assertions.description: The generated PR title must match the required format

assertions.name: PR title includes correct ticket ID
PR description mentions the bug fix
